From something as seemingly simple as contract advice – to an auto accident – to an accident with lingering physical issues due to a hotel’s negligence – to a fairly complicated social security benefits issue.

We know that we can call Bryan for a simple question or, if necessary, to file a lawsuit and walk beside us through to its conclusion.

Bryan Sutlive has gone above and beyond to serve our family.

We highly recommend Bryan Sutlive without reservation due not only to his expertise and excellent personal care for his clients, but also, very importantly, his character and his sincere concern for those who entrust to him their legal affairs.

Do not use this law firm, never received our whole settlement and never received money that was put back for my husbands memorial as he has terminal cancer and $4000 was supposedly set aside for that, which we still have NOT received. Do not recommend!!!

Bryan is the best Attorney I have ever worked with in my life. When I was involved in my auto accident I didn’t know what to do, I was scared and didn’t know who to trust. I walk away from my settlement VERY happy and satisfied and never once did I feel like I had been taken for a ride. He and his team is so supportive and the best of the best. I will NEVER use another Attorney EVER. I recommend him to anybody that I run into who needs a legal counsel. Thank you Sutlive and Associates for all the help you have provided to me and my family. You are the BEST.

Great experience working with Ke and Molly on my EB-2 NIW petition. The team was professional, responsive, and provided clear guidance throughout the process. Thanks to their support, my petition was successfully approved. Highly recommend their services.

I first requested a USCIS case by myself. However, I was required to respond for more evidence. USCIS cases are very serious. Therefore, I found KZ Law LLC. They are very responsible and patient on my case. They are also very professional. It took only a few days for us to prepare all the required documents. My case was approved after 1 day I submitted my RFE.

Karen has been an outstanding NIW attorney. She is extremely responsive, professional, and thorough. She handled my RFE response with great care and delivered an excellent final package. I was pleasantly surprised that my case was approved just one week after we submitted the RFE response. I’m truly grateful for Karen and Yammy’s help and would highly recommend her to anyone seeking NIW assistance. I will definitely choose her as my EB-1A attorney as well.

My NIW was ultimately approved, and I am truly grateful for her help. Highly recommended.

Karen and her team tried to figure out possible solutions to speed up the immigration process. They dig deep into the background and experience to make the petition outstanding. Deeply appreciate all the effort they made to have both NIW and EB1A applications approved in the first round.

As a District of Columbia resident injured while visiting family in Georgia, I needed a local attorney to help me negotiate a fair settlement. A trusted friend recommended Schwartz Trial Law LLC, assuring me that attorney Ryan Schwartz would be a strong advocate for my interests—and they were absolutely right.

At first, I was hesitant to work with a law firm. But after trying to handle the insurance company on my own and encountering nothing but delays and dismissiveness, I realized I needed professional support.

Ryan Schwartz and his team cut through the red tape immediately. Their commitment to securing the settlement I deserved was unwavering. I was kept informed every step of the way, but never felt burdened by the process. Their professionalism, persistence, and clear communication made all the difference.

In the end, I was fully satisfied with the outcome. Choosing Schwartz Trial Law LLC was the best decision I could have made, and I strongly encourage anyone in a similar situation to trust Ryan Schwartz with their case.
Thank you Ryan for being there for me!

Ryan is amazing. He is absolutely great. He helped me with a accident. He allowed me to receive full policy limits with both insurance companies.  Please 🙏 please 🙏 consider his law practice as number in Atlanta!!!

He immediately secured medical care for me, was always readily accessible , is very  approachable and is just a good, honest down to earth individual. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND HIM!!!!
Just amazing! Got me off on a serious charge and he is punctual and professional. Thanks you!

Ryan Schwartz should be your go to attorney for ANY wrongfully given ticket. My experience with Ryan Schwartz  was one of perfection. He answers EVERY CALL! He will respond by text when busy and return it as soon as he is able to when he can’t pick it up immediately. He calms nerves. He was found by sheer luck going through the internet to help me with a ridiculous ticket situation in a small town. Man did I choose the right guy. Don’t make a mistake by choosing  the WRONG person to represent you. Ryan Schwartz was THE RIGHT GUY! His fees are VERY FAIR! I had the privilege of working with Attorney Ryan from Schwartz Trial Law, and I cannot express enough gratitude for his exceptional legal expertise and unwavering dedication throughout my case. Facing a complicated situation, I was overwhelmed and uncertain of the outcome. However, Ryan's professionalism and adept handling of the matter quickly put my mind at ease.

Thank you, Ryan, and Schwartz Trial Law, for your outstanding representation and support.
Ryan is about his business, he will prioritize your case and make sure you get the BEST outcome. He's also a good person that genuinely cares about the well being of his clients.
Ryan was extraordinarily professional, personable and efficient in taking care of my legal matter. I highly recommend him!

I highly recommend Ryan for anyone in need of a traffic attorney. Hi did an excellent job handling me and my ticket, displaying a deep understanding intricacies of the county where I was cited and a  commitment to achieving the best possible outcome for me.  My outcome was outstanding and better than I anticipated. His responsiveness and willingness to answer my questions was quite helpful throughout the process. Additionally, Ryan's fees were very reasonable, making it a very cost-effective choice compared to alternative options (esp trying to handle this without counsel!). I am extremely satisfied with my results and will not hesitate to use Ryan's firm again in the future.
Great attorney, used Ryan for a case lasting over a year. Ryan was professional and thorough from start to finish.

I highly recommend hiring Ryan as your lawyer for any case that you may have pop up. And if Ryan can't help you he will know somebody who can. Ryan has helped me in my family get through a very tough time and I am very thankful that I had him on my side of the courtroom.

Due to Ryan Schwartz hard work and dedication to my case, I was able to avoid  an unfair plea agreement. He helped me rid myself of an unwarranted DUI charge, which in turn diminished other charges involved in my case. Overall, he saved me from having to serve over a year in jail, and we avoided having my license suspended. My family and I are grateful for all he has done. If you have an accident or just need a defense attorney, I highly recommend giving Mr. Schwartz a call.

What every attorney SHOULD be.

I received a citation for violation of a traffic signal, when I had not. After interviewing several attorneys, and not feeling 'right' in my gut about any of them ( some even suggested that I accept the citation for a reduction on points !) , I was referred to Ryan by a fellow top notch attorney (Ms. M. Rosenberg).  It took 3 minutes of speaking with him (he called me back when he was on vacation) to know he was that 'right one. Ryan is honest, refreshing, educated,  passionate, protective about his clients' rights, and goes the extra mile to find them justice. He reviewed all aspects of my case and took the time to explain his strategy beforehand. And it played out precisely like he had meticulously planned. He also had several alternative scenarios worked out in case this line failed. My case was dismissed before it even went to trial.
If you want the best of the best, but think that will cost you an arm and a leg- call Ryan. His exemplary service is worth many times more than what he charges.

Ryan is an excellent attorney. His hard work, responsiveness, and results for his clients truly sets him apart from his peers. Without hesitation, I would refer a client to him because I know they would be in great hands with him.

Regina,
We are very disappointed and at the same time, surprised to hear you are upset. We hold ourselves to a high standard, as evident from all other reviews we have received and we are not happy the value was not felt by you. We received an optimal settlement on the case too, which makes this review even more confusing. With the majority of your case being during COVID, many firms dealt with staff fluctuations and our firm was no different. However, we made sure there is always some one working and communicating with our clients including with you. We pride ourselves on being thorough and having superior attention to details, which is why our staff always asked if there was any other information or providers in addition to what we already had or what you had sent us. Your case was in litigation and completing a case within around two and half years mark is neither abnormal nor slow process, especially considering the additional delays we all faced due to COVID.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Sheffield,

I'm sorry you remain unhappy with my decision not to pursue your August 4, 2023 case, but I'm pleased you found another lawyer to assist you. As you will recall, I explained at the time that in order to provide the level of attention our clients deserve, are compelled to be very selective in deciding which cases to pursue. The fact that I was unwilling to pursue your case, despite having successfully represented you ten years earlier, was not meant as any sort of personal insult. I just did not feel your 2023 case met the strict criteria we adhere to.

Contrary to your claim that I "dropped [you] in the middle of a case," I communicated my decision to you, both over the phone and in writing, on September 23, 2023, a mere five weeks after your accident. Thus, you still had 23-plus months to find another attorney, which clearly you did.

Understanding that you remain upset about this years after the fact and despite what you reported to be the successful resolution of your claim, perhaps it will help you--and anyone reading your review--to read September 12, 2023 letter I sent you, in which I explained the reasons I was unwilling to pursue your case. I apologized then, as I do now, that I did not believe there was more I could do for you, and as noted above, I'm pleased things ultimately worked out well for you.

*************************************************************************
Mr. XXXXXX Sheffield
XXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXX, Georgia XXXXX
ADVANCE VIA EMAIL: XXXXXX@XXXXX.com

Re: Your August 4, 2023 Automobile Accident Claim

Dear Mr. Sheffield:

As we discussed at length earlier today, after conducting a thorough investigation into the facts of your case, and after considerable contemplation, I have concluded that I do NOT believe we would be able to carry our burden of proving that the XXXXXX County Public Schools bus driver is responsible for the collision. As I emphasized repeatedly, this does not mean I think you are at fault for the wreck, but rather, I am simply saying that the available evidence would not allow us to convince a jury that the bus driver should be held liable.

We are constrained by Georgia law which requires the claimant (you in this case) to prove by a preponderance of the evidence that the bus driver was negligent and that his negligence caused the collision. If a jury were to conclude that it was 50/50, we would lose. To be clear, we need to show that it is more likely than not that the bus driver was the cause of the crash, and unfortunately, I do not see a path forward to proving that. Thus, as you requested, I am sending you this letter to formally terminate our attorney-client relationship such that you are free to consult with another attorney if you wish to do so.

Please note that the time within which you can bring a lawsuit for injuries you sustained in your August 4, 2023 accident is two years from the date of injury. Thus, if you choose to pursue a claim, you must be aware of this deadline, and if your case is not already resolved, you need to file a suit on or before August 4, 2025. Your failure to file a lawsuit prior to the expiration of the statute of limitations will bar your claim forever. I believe I have sent you everything from your file but if you feel there is any additional information, please let me know and I will do my best to get it to you without delay. Similarly, if you hire another attorney and that attorney wishes to speak with me, I am happy to do so.

Again, I am terribly sorry I was unable to do more for you and regret that things did not turn out otherwise. If you find another lawyer to handle your case, I hope it goes well and as mentioned above, I would be happy to assist in any way I could. As always, if you have any questions or comments, please do not hesitate to contact me. With kind regards, I am

Sincerely,

KOPELMAN SITTON LAW GROUP, LLC

Richard Kopelman

Exceptional Dedication & Support
From the moment I sought legal guidance from Richard Kopelman, I knew I had found not just an attorney, but a dedicated advocate for justice and care. Before even formally accepting my case concerning the neglect and malpractice my mother faced in a rehabilitation facility, Richard demonstrated an unparalleled commitment to investigating my claims thoroughly. His approach is both personal and professional, extending his support far beyond what one might expect, delving into the intricacies of the case with a fine-tooth comb and sparing no resource in the pursuit of truth.

What stands out the most is Richard's genuine concern for my well-being as a caregiver during this tumultuous time. His frequent check-ins and readiness to offer support in various capacities highlight a level of empathy and dedication that is rare in today's fast-paced legal world. It's clear that Richard's ethos is not just about legal representation but about making a meaningful difference in the lives of those he interacts with.

I have yet to officially become Richard's client, but the effort and resources he has already invested in my situation speak volumes about his character and professional ethos. It's evident that Richard and his team value the human aspect of their work, prioritizing assistance and support over formalities and case numbers.

I am compelled to share my experience with Richard Kopelman in this review, not only to express my heartfelt appreciation for his exceptional support during a challenging period but also to highlight the unique approach he brings to the legal profession. It's clear that for Richard and his team, it's not just about the cases they take on but about the people they help along the way. This level of dedication and personal investment is truly commendable, and I am grateful for the difference Richard has made in our lives, even before any legal proceedings have begun.

reviews.text:
An attorney who cares about you the “person” as much as you the “client”.

In a word, Richard Kopelman is “rare”.  Yes, Richard, the attorney is a kind, caring, sharp, experienced, and very capable lawyer, but Richard, the man, is “rare”.  If you're reading this review and have any apprehension about retaining Richard as your attorney, I’ll tell you now, you can relax. Richard takes a “holistic approach” with his clients. I know this is an odd way to describe a lawyer-client relationship, but it's the truth. My husband was injured when another driver failed to yield the right of way. At age 60+, he did all the “right things” to be a responsible person and business owner… and yet, one bad decision of another driver resulted in catastrophic losses. My husband’s commercial vehicle was totaled and impounded with all of his work equipment still on the vehicle. With clients waiting, him being injured and his ability to provide for us COMPLETELY taken away in an instant, we were overwhelmed, disgusted, and in a state of disbelief.

You go through a range of emotions when this sort of thing happens only to quickly realize you’d better snap out of it and seek help starting the physical, emotional, and financial recovery of what was taken away from you. Over 25 years ago, Richard represented my brother, then a couple of years later he represented a second brother. The fact that I remembered Richard from that long ago, should tell you something. When I reached out to Richard over the weekend, he immediately reached back out the same night.  The next day, he sent back written answers to every question and assured me everything would be ok, telling us to focus on my husband getting better for now. He wanted to know if we were ok and asked how my husband is feeling. He assured me that he would help us. When we spoke, I told him about my brothers, and not only did he remember them, he asked very specific questions about their well-being.  Richard’s assistant Anne is WONDERFUL. She too, is kind, helpful, and so patient.  Having them work with us and guide us through this maze of red tape is a huge blessing. No matter how small our questions are, no matter what Richard is busy doing (even during daddy duty)… He ALWAYS answers my calls or returns them ASAP.  Anne is equally responsive.

They are empathetic and take the time to LISTEN and give informative answers every since we have started the process of putting things back together. Richard reassures us constantly that things will work out. Retaining Richard has been a no-brainer for us because the level of service and attention to detail he renders is simply amazing. Richard and Anne frequently end texts and emails: "I hope your husband is getting better every day”.

In a big city like Atlanta, attorneys are a dime a dozen… but the Richard Kopelman’s of the world are indeed a “rare-find”.
reviews.ownerResponse: Debi, it means the world to me knowing Anne and I have been able to put you and Bob at ease during this difficult time. As we've discussed, and as you recalled from my having represented your brothers, this will certainly be a process, but we'll be here to guide you and Bob through it from start-to-finish. Most important is making sure Bob get well, or at least as well as he can get. Next, we will do everything we can to maximize Bob's recovery, whether by settlement or trial. We'll do this as quickly as possible, but will not rush to resolution because we want to be sure that we know the full nature and extent of Bob's injuries before we even consider resolving his case. In the meantime, please continue updating Anne and me as you have, and please don't hesitate to call, text, or email if there's anything we can do for you and Bob.

reviews.text: Richard did a great job for me when I was in an accident in 2020, so when misfortune found me a year later, I didn't hesitate to call him again. And just like the first time, Richard and Anne treated me great and got my case settled for the full amount of available insurance coverage. I hope I never am involved in an accident again...But if am...I won't hesitate to call Richard and Anne!!!!!--Barbara M.
reviews.ownerResponse: Barbara, as discussed, Anne and I are sorry you had the misfortune of being injured in another car accident but we're grateful we had the pleasure of representing you again, and thrilled things worked out so well. Really hoping this was the last time you'll need our help, but as you know, we're always here for you.

reviews.text: I had a case handled by Madison Gibbs at this office and she was amazing! So easy to talk to and deal with. She made the whole process stress free and I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for counsel.

I am beyond grateful for the exceptional legal services provided by Attorney Sara Gheesling. At 48 years old with no prior arrests, I never imagined I would find myself in a situation requiring legal representation for a DUI charge. From the moment I met Sara, I knew I was in capable hands. She was not only highly professional and knowledgeable but also genuinely compassionate, making me feel comfortable and supported throughout the entire process.

What truly impressed me was Sara's strategic approach, particularly her use of the double jeopardy argument. She skillfully navigated the complexities of my case and, through her expertise, was able to get the case dismissed. It was a relief I can't even begin to describe. Her attention to detail, thorough understanding of the law, and innovative legal strategy were key in achieving this outcome.

If you’re looking for an attorney who is not only talented but also deeply invested in your case, I highly recommend Sara Gheesling. She gave me the best possible chance, and I am forever thankful for her hard work and dedication.
Answered my questions quickly and concisely and was extremely helpful, got me a great result in my case and kept things professional

Madison Gibbs was a terrific help in my very serious case. She went to court with me twice and kept negotiating until we got the exact best result. I’m am thrilled and highly recommend her, Kimberly Berry, and the Lawson and Berry firm
Excellent law firm. I recommend this law firm for criminal defense.

I had the privilege to work with Mrs. Kimberly Berry on my DUI case. She was my lawyer for almost a year and a half. She is a very well spoken and intelligent woman who helped guide me through the processes of my case. Even when I was being difficult she stayed professional and patient and I will forever be grateful for that. Thank you Mrs.Berry, I genuinely wish you nothing but the best. Also thank you Mr. Lawson for being polite and forthright. 10/10 Recommend

If you’re reading this review it means you or a loved one is going through a rough time, and you are weighting your options. My family and I also were in a similar situation. She is the reason why I am able to post this review today and give her and her staff such high praise. She was very attentive to my case even though she had such busy schedule and made sure I was taken care of every step of the way. I have nothing but gratitude towards Lawson & Berry for the way they treated my case and my family. I trusted her with my life and she did not disappoint. Thank you once again Kimberly, Christy, and Madison for making this horrible ordeal something of the past.

Mr. Lawson is the best criminal defense attorney anyone could ask for. His expertise, attention to detail, and commitment to get best outcome for me was very obvious throughout the process. Communication was always clear, and he made complex legal matters easy to understand. I felt fully confident in his ability to get the best outcome and he did. I highly recommend Mr. Lawson for anyone seeking the best legal counsel in Georgia!

Richard knows the law, your rights and will work for you.  And I don't mean just going through the motions and cutting a deal, he will work to get you the best possible outcome.  10/10 the best decision I made to hire his firm.

This law firm is miraculously amazing!! I was charged with a dui in the most challenging county in GA and was found not guilty. (Clayton county). Their experience and patience exceeded my expectations.

Personally I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your unwavering support and tireless effort in handling my DUI less safe case over the past 4 years. The journey was challenging, and at times, it felt like there was no end in sight, especially with the prosecutor refusing to make a deal, despite me being well under the legal limit. However, you never wavered or backed down. Your determination, keen attention to detail, and thorough understanding of the law were evident every step of the way.
Throughout the trial, you fought for us with incredible skill and dedication, never missing a beat. We could not have asked for a more capable and compassionate lawyer on our side. Thanks to your hard work, we were able to win the case and finally put this ordeal behind us. We will forever be grateful for everything you’ve done for our family.
Thank you again for taking on our case and for fighting so fiercely for us. We are incredibly thankful for you and the Lawson Firm

I cannot express enough gratitude for Kimberly Berry and the Lawson Firm for their exceptional work on my husband's DUI less safe case, which dragged on for 4 long years. From day one, Kimberly fought tirelessly for us, never backing down even when the prosecutor refused to negotiate and was very unprofessional, despite my husband being well under the legal limit for the state of Georgia. Her dedication, attention to detail, and unwavering determination were remarkable. Kimberly never missed a beat during the trial, addressing every angle of the case with confidence and expertise. She truly cared about us and our future, ensuring that we were well-informed and supported throughout the entire process.

Thanks to Kimberly and her team at the Lawson Firm, we walked away victorious. We will forever be thankful for their dedication and hard work in winning our case. If you ever find yourself in a tough legal situation, I wholeheartedly recommend Kimberly Berry she’s a fighter and my family will forever be grateful for her service.

It has been since October 2019 and they still have yet to send a simple email after countless detailed voicemails and emails from me, the insurance company and my other representatives. This is ridiculous. I've only been able to actually get someone on the phone 3 times during this whole process. It does not take over a year to send a simple email. This has been a tremendous waste of time and energy. I recommend avoiding this place at all cost if you have been involved in a auto accident.

The absolute worst law firm to me! They don’t update you on your case, you have to guess and wonder what’s going on. Do you read what you sent to needy people at this law firm?

I had a car accident and my insurance company gave me a very hard time, they didn’t want to pay
For my repairs and I became very stressed and started getting anxiety.  I called Mr Attorney Suggs, he explained to me how to handle my insurance company and told me what to do, and said if I need him, he will represent me in court when we sue them. Attorney Eldridge Suggs has been a nightmare  for me. Attorney Suggs allowed the stature of limitation run out before he filed my case against Macy which he had all the medical information needed to file.  I fell in Macy in 2015  and I  had surgery in October 2017 were I had three plates put in my hip because my pelvis had separated from my hip. Doctor had stated that this was caused from the fall. Macy walked away without being penalized. I tried to make Attorney Suggs to pay for his negligence but he didn't carry malpractice insurance so he got away. I have suffered a great amount of pain and much loss. In 2020 still suffering now I have to have a hip replacement . I hope this does not happen to anyone else.  Suggs  you are not a good  Attorney.  You know you did me wrong.
I have dealt with many law firms over the years. This is the worst firm ever. Don’t walk, run!

Thanks to Suggs Law Firm I was able to still walk away on top, after being involved in a 5 car pile up accident on downtown connector March/2019. Mr. Suggs truly fought for my case from the beginning; it was nothing but sound advice. Funny thing is I was actually referred to Suggs Law Firm by the wrecker service who towed my car. I’m glad that I listened because the next day after the accident I must’ve gotten numerous calls from attorneys trying to take my case, not even knowing how all of that worked at the time. I’m very grateful for the outcome and would recommend Suggs Law to anyone looking for a great attorney who will build rapport with you and fight for what is yours!
Mr Suggs does good work. I was Satisfied with the outcome of my case.

Mr. Suggs said we were going through the process and we are going to win. He came through on that promise more than I could have imagined. Mr. Suggs and the team were more than well prepared and he took the confidence into the courtroom and presented my case with enthusiasm, knowledge, and the utmost professionalism. I highly recommend attorney Suggs and his team / law firm, they became more than my representation but more like family. He is trust worthy and trust in him to get what you deserve!

Outstanding Legal Representation – Highly Recommend Greg Greenberg!

On May 12 2024 Mother’s Day, I took my partner out to celebrate when we were involved in a terrible car accident. We were driving through a green light when a drunk driver—who had no headlights on—ran a red light and crashed into us. It was a frightening experience, but thankfully, Greg Greenberg and his team at Greg Greenberg Law, PLLC fought tirelessly on my behalf.

Greg didn’t just go after the drunk driver—he also held the bar/restaurant accountable for over-serving alcohol.  His dedication, expertise, and relentless pursuit of justice ensured that I received the compensation I deserved. He made a stressful situation much easier to navigate, keeping me informed and advocating for me every step of the way.
If you ever need a lawyer who truly fights for you, Greg Greenberg is the one to call. Highly recommend his services!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience. I’m truly grateful for your trust, especially after such a traumatic and unexpected event. What you went through on Mother’s Day was incredibly difficult, and I’m glad we were able to step in quickly to guide you through the legal and emotional aftermath.
Holding both the drunk driver and the establishment accountable was essential to ensuring you received the justice and compensation you deserved. I appreciate you recognizing the effort, communication, and advocacy that went into your case.
Your recommendation means a great deal to me and my team. If you ever need anything in the future, we’re always here to support you.

It was two years of frustration & uncertainty. Guys always research any referral from your chiros, not all those folks are competent.
I reached out to Attorney Greg on March 2024, based on the positive feedback from my older sibling and I cannot praise him enough for the excellent assistance he provided. From the start, they displayed professionalism, compassion, and a thorough understanding of the legal process, making me feel assured that my case was in capable hands. Their communication was exceptional throughout, always keeping me informed and answering my questions in a clear and timely manner. They took the time to explain every step of the process, ensuring I fully understood my options and the potential outcomes. What truly stood out was their dedication to achieving the best possible result for me. They fought tirelessly on my behalf and secured a settlement that far exceeded my expectations.

I’m so glad &  incredibly grateful knowing this firm, the work, attention to detail, and unwavering support during a difficult time. If you’re looking for an attorney who is not only highly skilled but also genuinely cares about their clients, I highly recommend Attorney Greg Greenberg. They turned a stressful situation into one where I felt supported and taken care of every step of the way! His prompt responses to my questions always gives me hope, which at the end yielded a huge settlement on my case. I’ll definitely be referring my folks here.

reviews.text:
How do you express your heartfelt gratitude to people who are doing what they love to do...living their passion of making the lives of others better than they were before they came into their office? My attempt to do just that is here.
It's called an 'accident' because it is something the other person did not intend to do on purpose. It is called insurance, because things happen beyond our control and it is meant to be there to help us in those times.
I have been the victim in 3 car accidents over the past 7 years. I had a kind, older attorney who helped resolve the first two and I learned much through those experiences. First, as a victim who has been injured, there is so much to do to prepare to address the battle of insurance.I had to gather my entire medical history. A challenging feat when you are not feeling well and are in great pain and have difficulty moving, sleeping, driving, and more. Despite that, you have to work, deal with everyday life stressors as well as the threats and delays that accompany the process. If you are like me, you also have to get comfortable with the unfamiliarity of attorneys offices. Fortunately, attorneys who work to help those of us who are injured seem to have the compassion of the best healers.
To get through it all, I chose to see the opportunity to learn a great deal about life and the how-to's that are required to make it through the legal processes, my health improvement, and getting my life back on course.

My last accident (similar to my first) happened when I was sitting still in traffic. A road was being fixed and we had to move to one lane from 3. A large truck was not being allowed to move over so I stopped to let him in.  A car on the other side of him scared him and he inadvertently turned and hit 'me' - my car. When they 'totaled my car', I felt doubly victimized. I have a SUPER chiropractor who has helped me heal and so I immediately saw him and he immediately began to help me repair my body- again. The insurance company reviewed the accident and made a small offer. I had no idea that it was negotiable. It WAS and THAT is where the Law Offices of K. Douglas Cook and specifically, Steven A. Herman and his amazing paralegal associate, Alecia Brooks came to my rescue. In the end, they were able to resolve my settlement and increased it by 8 times!

Although, I will live with the side effects of the injuries the rest of my life, the temporary relief this offered was worth its weight in gold.
I have learned through my experiences, it is important to receive the retribution owed through insurance. However, I have also learned that there is more to healing than meets the eye. Having someone like Steven Herman stand WITH you with ease, knowledge and genuinely positive intention to improve your life, I am witness to the great fact that you CAN heal. Through it the quality of your life will also improve.

It's up to you to choose the person you want to represent you...I strongly suggest you choose K. Douglas Cook...and rest assured.

Start your healing process today! The only thing it costs you is a sense of trust and Faith in the process.

Best wishes to YOU. And a Million Thanks to the Law Offices of K. Douglas Cook for improving my outlook and quality of life!

Alison O

My family had a very disappointing experience with this law office. I reached out for help regarding my son’s case and hoped they would fully review all relevant information. Instead, the case was dropped without any documentation provided to me and without contacting the Lawrenceville Police Department, who had indicated they were willing to share important information. I expected a more thorough and communicative approach, especially given the seriousness of the situation. Unfortunately, I did not feel that my concerns were taken seriously or that the case was investigated with the care it deserved.

Update 1/7/2026

Thank you for your response. I want to be very clear in return.

While I appreciate that your firm states it conducted a “thorough review,” the reality is that your decision to decline representation occurred without a full and meaningful investigation. That premature conclusion not only failed my son, but it pushed me dangerously close to the statute of limitations while critical facts were still being uncovered.

Despite the lack of assistance from your firm, through my own diligent and persistent efforts—often in the face of resistance—I have now been informed that the investigation into my son’s murder has been reopened. This directly contradicts the position your office took that there was no viable path forward.

So I must ask plainly: what exactly would I be calling your firm for now, when your earlier determination was incorrect and your inaction contributed to delay rather than justice?

Your response to my Google review appears to be more reputational than substantive. While your words express sympathy, sympathy without competent action does not protect grieving families from harm—especially when legal time limits are at stake.

I am continuing forward without your assistance. This message is sent for the record.

Tamara Hunter
Mother of Tra’von Hunter
Seeking accountability, not condolences (Justice for Tra'von)
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to speak with us and for allowing our team to review your son’s case. We know reaching out was not easy, especially while navigating such an unimaginable loss. Please know that we approached our preliminary investigation with care, urgency, and a sincere hope that we would be able to help you.

After a thorough review of the available information, we were unfortunately unable to identify a clear path to establish the level of negligence required under Georgia law to move forward. This is never the outcome we want to deliver, especially to a mother who is experiencing such profound grief.

We want you to know that this conclusion is not a reflection of your son, his life, or the significance of your pain. It is simply a legal limitation that prevents us from being able to pursue the case in a way that would meet the standard necessary for a successful outcome.

We are truly sorry that we cannot provide the assistance you were seeking. Our hearts are with you and your family, and we can only imagine the weight of what you are carrying. If you ever need help locating additional resources or have questions about anything we reviewed, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Wishing you strength and comfort during this incredibly difficult time.

A while ago, I found myself in need of representation for a workers compensation claim. Mr. Douglas Kalienta spoke with me three times in the same day. He is without a doubt the kindest, friendliest, most professional lawyer I have ever spoken with. 
I cold-called his office one morning and gave him a little background about my injury and employment. Mr. Kalienta asked several questions to determine if he was able to handle my particular situation. Sadly, he was not, since my employer was in a different state. He offered to contact some associates from the neighboring state who are also members of a national organization he is associated with who work to assist people everywhere in the US with legal representation.
In the afternoon, he called just to let me know he was waiting to hear back from an associate.
In the evening, he called again to report the information he had been given about the differences in state laws. He then apologised for not being able to help!
I explained to Mr. Kalienta that he had been very helpful because he had brain-stormed with an associate about my case & gave me recommendations and advice to advance my case. He did all this our of the goodness of his heart and because he is an honest and straightforward man. He made me feel that my concerns were important.
If you need representation in Georgia, you will not regret contacting Mr. Douglas Kalienta. He will tell you exactly what's -what and he will make the time to help you in any way he can.

I discovered the law firm of Morrison & Hughes, where Mr. Nick Ponzio is an associate attorney, following an injury that I sustained while on the job, and Mr. Ponzio worked on my case for nearly two years.  We were finally able to settle the case recently because Mr. Ponzio was able to negotiate a settlement that allowed me to have some closure with a case that could have otherwise potentially dragged on for more than just two years.

The one thing that I discovered about working with Mr. Ponzio and his law firm is that I was able to receive the personal attention that those other big law firms that have their ads on television and other media outlets are not able to offer their clients.  Not to cast aspersions on any other law firms, I'm quite certain that most of them are just great.  However, judging from my personal experiences, I have often discovered that I tend to get more personal attention dealing with a law firm such as Morrison & Hughes where I'm not just some a number.

Attorneys are often working on multiple cases simultaneously while performing several other tasks.  The majority of the time, you might be dealing with a  paralegal rather than the attorney that is assigned to you.  Mr. Ponzio is quite knowledgeable and was very instrumental in assisting me to navigate the challenges that I faced with my workers comp case.  Even when I was feeling overwhelmed and stressed out, he was there to listen to me vent about what was going on with the other side.  Never once did he make me feel that I was  monopolizing his time, and for that I will always be grateful to him.

Workers compensation cases are very complex cases and can be quite challenging.  Therefore, having an attorney like Mr. Ponzio whose expertise includes dealing with such cases is essential.  He understands the inner workings of these cases from both points of view since he has several years of practicing from both sides of the isle.  Mr. Ponzio has experiences representing the corporation as well as the injured client, thus it is one of the reasons I feel comfortable recommending Mr. Ponzio and his law firm for your next injury case.

Although the firm has several main offices to serve the metro Atlanta area, I happen to like their Alpharetta/ Roswell office because it is very centrally located and easily accessible.

If she said she was going to get an answer to any questions I had I usually had the answer the same day or the following day.  It was a pleasure to work with her.  Although I dealt with her the longest, I can honestly say that everyone I spoke with at the firm was very much the same.  If your looking for an attorney who will go the distance for you and is a pro at navigating the crazy red tape and all the hoops you have to jump through, the Keener Law Firm is the one to go with.

reviews.text:
I am writing to express my profound dissatisfaction with the legal services provided by Russell Keener at Keener Law Firm. I feel it is crucial to convey the serious concerns I have experienced, which have significantly impacted my case and overall experience.

My primary concern revolves around the lack of engagement and perceived disinterest from Russell Keener  regarding my specific situation. Despite the helpfulness and care extended by the support staff, the main lawyer appeared jaded and genuinely uninterested in understanding the nuances of my case. This lack of connection and empathy was deeply concerning, as it felt as though my unique circumstances were not being adequately considered.

Furthermore, I was extremely disappointed and negatively impacted by the fact that Russell Keener did not appear for my initial hearing. This absence resulted in significant delays, costing me additional time and forcing me to wait months for a new hearing. Such an oversight is unacceptable and demonstrates a lack of preparedness or commitment to my case.

The advice I received often felt inconsistent and, at times, involved harsh and un compassionate statements. It appeared that when it was time for  Russell Keener to perform essential duties, there was a consistent lack of familiarity or readiness concerning my case details.

Given these experiences, I would strongly advise others to consider alternative legal representation. I believe it is important for potential clients to be aware of the issues I encountered, as they significantly detracted from the quality of representation and caused unnecessary stress and delay. Resulting in an epic fail and loss of case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Joel, I’m truly sorry you feel disappointed. We take every client’s case seriously and appreciate you sharing your experience. Because of confidentiality, I can’t discuss details here, but I do want to clarify one point: the January 8, 2025 hearing was postponed by the court due to a phone-connection issue, and we did appear at the rescheduled hearing on May 23, 2025.

Our file reflects extensive work on your claim (appeals, record requests/submissions, and hearing preparation), and we understand how discouraging an unfavorable decision can be. If you’ll contact me directly at 770-955-3000, I’ll gladly review the timeline with you, share our submission receipts, and discuss anything we could have done better. reviews.text:
Keener Law firm took our case when no one else would!

We applied for disability for my husband before covid. With covid the court system was backed up and his case got delayed in finalizing. We couldn't find any representation then, but kept through the appeal process and made it to a hearing where we lost. A year or two passed, my husband tried and failed many jobs again where we knew we needed to apply one more time. I looked for lawyers before applying and either didn't get responses from firms or got denied/told they would represent us at the hearing level. I started the application again on my own.

After it had been processing for over 6 months with no word and hearing a lot of people recommend Keener Law firm on a community board, I reached out hoping for a different response, but dreading the anticipated rejection. Boy, was I wrong!

Someone from the law firm called the next day to start a lengthy intake before even agreeing to take my husband's case. That was already very different than anything else I had experienced where they wanted us to send records to review before even speaking to us. The day after they called to set up a formal interview with my husband and got everything else verified to be able to represent him and let me be his contact point. Special shout out to Janae who was always quick to respond to any of my messages in the portal.

Even with it being our 2nd time applying there were still things that would come up that I would be confused about if we needed to send off/had we already completed it and they handled everything to a T, even going to bat for us against the case worker who was claiming she didn't receive forms we had completed long before.

Not only did we get approved, but they made sure we had the optimum back pay amount for our situation. My only regret is not finding them sooner and all the stress I could have saved myself with both time and the application process.

I'm convinced there is no law firm like Keener Law in the metro ATL area. There are not enough thank you's in the world for what they did for us when no one else would. They are worth every penny they get and more!

To everyone who helped with our case, but especially Janae, thank you for looking at your clients as people and not numbers. I don't know where we would be without you guys!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your story and for your incredibly kind words. We’re truly honored that you placed your trust in our firm after such a long and difficult process. Our team — especially Janae — works hard to treat every client with care, persistence, and attention to detail, so it’s deeply rewarding to know that made a difference for your family. We’re thrilled that your husband’s case was approved and that we could help you achieve the outcome you deserved.

— Russell G. Keener, The Keener Law Firm

First I will note that I have not yet received the decision of my disability case, and that the Keener Law Firm worked with me years ago and I was awarded a positive outcome.

I can't say enough how the outcome either way has it's implications in the work put in, but obviously the decision in these cases is based on my own situation and the perspective of a judge with whom a wealth of information and documents may be provided.

I have many, many different resources from which we needed to get reports, medical documents, and doctor's opinions.  The Keener Law Firm and Mr. Keener's staff were overwhelmingly competent when it came to gathering the evidence and making the requests.

Through email or by phone, I was always able to get hold of one of his legal assistants, and each day I asked a question or made a call, I was responded to the same.

Mr. Keener provided a lengthy pretrial conversation with me, and he presented the case at trial comprehensibly and convincingly.
He took the time beforehand to answer any questions I had, and gave me crucial and simple advice for how to present myself and my answers during trial.

I would like to give shout outs to Anastasia, Holly, and Jayla for their work, efforts, and attentiveness.  Anastasia and Holly always made me feel accepted and understood, and there were times I no doubt ranted about things, and they took the time to treat me with compassion and help me return to relevant conversational tangents.  There were a lot of forms they had to address, and information to gather, most of which all I needed to do was provide them with names, places, and what they needed to seek out.  They came up with everything else, and I don't believe I could have achieved anything other than my own reports without them.  With the Keener Law Firm by my side, I have great confidence in my representation and case, no matter the results.

Sincerely

reviews.text: I cannot recommend Darren and his team highly enough! After my husband was in a motorcycle accident, I quickly realized how overwhelming dealing with the insurance companies were going to be, when my sole focus was getting him the care he was going to need to recover. Knowing I didn't have the expertise to navigate the insurance companies and their attorneys, I searched online and found Darren and his firm. I chose them for their outstanding reviews and because they weren't "TV evangelist attorneys". Not only did Darren come to our home to meet us and discuss the accident and case, he let us do exactly what we needed to do, which was focus on recovery. Darren and his team took the stress of dealing with the insurance companies, their attorneys, the hospital and all of the specialists we needed to see off of our shoulders. So much work went on behind the scenes on our behalf, and Darren kept us updated regularly so we could keep up with the process. He is ethical, committed to his clients and their best interests, and works extremely hard to get the best resolution possible. "Thank you" doesn't even begin to adequately express our gratitude and it has honestly been a pleasure to work with Darren. If I could give any advice at all, it would be to trust his expertise and trust the process. Resolution takes time, but he will get you the best one possible. I would recommend Darren and his team to anyone needing an injury attorney.

Apparently my review was removed so I will go ahead and post it again. I had a personal injury case with this firm. Nothing was ever done in my case for over a year. When I requested a copy of my records, I noticed that they hadn't even requested my medical records in order to proceed with my demand. An employee, Elizabeth Madan, is very rude and unprofessional. I called to check on my case and was told that the demand was not sent when she had already told me it was. She was laughing at me the whole time on the phone. I asked for the attorney, Andrews Fernandez, to call me back a week ago and I haven't heard from him at all. I sent him an email and no luck. It is very unfortunate that a company behaves that way with their clients and I dont think a person like Elizabeth Madan should be working with people. They also told me confidential information from another case that Im not involved in. PLEASE PLEASE, dont bring your case to this law firm. There are many other law firms out there that will help you but don't come here. PLEASE DON'T. THEY DO NOT CARE ABOUT THEIR CLIENTS.

Aparentemente mi review fue eliminada, así que la publicaré nuevamente. Tuve un caso de lesiones personales con esta firma. Nunca se hizo nada en mi caso durante más de un año. Le envié un correo electrónico y no tuve suerte. Es muy desafortunado que una empresa se comporte de esa manera con sus clientes y no creo que una persona como Elizabeth Madan deba trabajar con otras personas. También me dijeron información confidencial de otro caso en el que no estoy involucrado. POR FAVOR, no presente su caso a esta firma de abogados. Hay muchas otras firmas de abogados que lo ayudarán, pero no vengan aquí. POR FAVOR NO. A ellos no le importan sus clientes.

From the very first day I sat down with Michael and Calanit, I knew I was in the right place. Because of Michael, Calanit, and the PMP Law team, I felt supported, protected, and truly represented when I needed it most. "In the summer of 2015 my mother was killed by a nursing home while she was recovering from a brain infection. I originally went to a local attorney in the town where I lived  but that attorney suggested I turn the case over to PMHP, LLC. Mike and Bill came to my town to see me and I signed on with their firm. For the remainder of the time I worked predominantly with Mike but other attorneys in the firm were working in the background. I didn't realize exactly all they had done until I received the final accounting of the settlement with a full accounting of their expenses. Although I really wanted to go to trial, as it neared the trial date, it became clear that due to some of the particulars of the case, it made more sense to settle out of court. I think we would have been awarded a larger settlement from a jury but being awarded and collecting are two different things. Although Mike always said that how we proceeded was up to me, he gave me the facts and guided me in the right direction for my case.  I f you ever need an attorney for personal injury to represent you, I highly recommend PMHP LLC. "

If I had to rate Dozier Law Group on a scale of 1-10, I would absolutely give them a 10. This is based on a combination of things: their encyclopedic knowledge of the law, a willingness to go above and beyond what is required, uncompromising advocacy for clients, genuine concern for their clients’ welfare, consistent responsiveness to calls and e-mails, and they are just really good people to deal with. You know you will be well taken care of from your first meeting on. I don’t know what more you can ask of a law firm.

I just spoke with Attorney Dozier. He was able to provide all the pertinent information I needed regarding the legal assistance I was seeking. He is superior to other attorneys in his kindness and clarity. He is a man who cares and shows it through and through. Thank you Brad, your kindness and care will never be forgotten.

Dozier Law Group is a stellar law firm. They are extremely professional, dedicated and dependable.  From start to finish, they provide first-rate service. One of the most impressive things about the firm is that they will make themselves available and will work around your schedule, including nights and weekends. This demonstrates their superior level of commitment and service to their clients.

My experience with Dozier Law Group was tremendous. I was treated as if my issue was the most important matter in their office. I felt like I was made a priority, even though I know the firm was handling many other matters and was busy working with other clients and their cases.  I have nothing but positive things to say about the firm and their people. They are really invested in helping their clients, they work hard, and they pay close attention to the important details. I couldn’t have asked for more from a law firm, and I would enthusiastically recommend the firm to anyone out there who needs legal advice and representation.

I am deeply dissatisfied with my experience at this law firm. During my consultation with “Brad,” I found his communication style to be passive-aggressive and dismissive. Several of his remarks were particularly concerning, including the statement: “The rich have always treated the poor horribly. It’s been going on for thousands of years, that’s how the system is and always will be,” followed by the suggestion that if I wanted to be treated fairly, I should “start my own business.”

As someone seeking legal guidance during a difficult time, I expected professionalism, objectivity, and empathy. Instead, I felt discouraged and unheard. I was advised that I did not have a case, yet after consulting with another attorney who carefully evaluated the details, I was informed that I do, in fact, have a viable claim.

I do not write reviews lightly, but I believe others should be aware of my experience. I strongly encourage prospective clients to thoroughly evaluate their options before retaining this firm.

Note: While I was not retained as a client, I did have a phone consultation with “Brad” of the firm, which is the basis of my review. A consultation is still a professional interaction, and the tone and statements made during that call are what I addressed.

Describing my feedback as a misunderstanding or emotional reaction avoids accountability for how the communication was handled. I have also noticed a pattern in the firm’s responses to negative reviews; rather than openly acknowledging a person’s experience, the tone often comes across as defensive, minimizing feedback and shifting responsibility onto the reviewer. This mirrors the passive-aggressive communication style I experienced during my consultation, as well as concerns expressed in other negative reviews.

My review reflects my direct experience, and I stand by it.
reviews.ownerResponse: This individual is not a current or former client of Dozier Law Group. No one at the firm has ever met with her, represented her in a legal dispute, or provided her with any legal advice about any matter. It is unfortunate that isolated comments offered in the course of a phone consultation were apparently misconstrued. Dozier Law Group  is dedicated to helping individuals who have experienced unlawful discrimination and harassment in the workplace. However, not everyone who believes they have been the victim of an unlawful employment action has a claim which is actionable. Whether a person has a colorable case depends on a variety of factors and circumstances. Evaluating whether there is evidence which would support a claim for unlawful discrimination or harassment is a critical part of the process. If, in our professional opinion, we believe there is insufficient evidence to meet the burden of proof in a case, we are direct and candid in our assessment. Unfortunately, our professional opinion does not always comport with a person’s thoughts, feelings or beliefs about what they experienced and the lawfulness of their employer’s actions. It is not uncommon for people to become emotional and upset when they are given an opinion that does not align with theirs. While a person might not agree with the way in which an opinion is expressed, and they may misconstrue the meaning of what is being communicated, we always strive to be direct and candid with people who contact us with a concerning situation. As much as we would like to assist everyone who contacts us, that is simply not possible. Many cases simply cannot be brought and won for numerous reasons. If we believe that a person has a case that can be pursued by developing and obtaining the necessary evidence, we will work tirelessly to represent that person’s interests. Our commitment to our clients is unquestionable and unwavering. The comments from individuals who have actually been clients, those whom we’ve had the privilege to represent and with whom we have meaningful relationships, are a testament to our values, our efforts, and our proven results.

I was pleasantly surprised at how gracious and supportive he was over the time we talked. If I could give Dozier Law Group a 6-Star rating I would. The firm represented me in a significant legal dispute and they did an exceptional job. I worked mainly with attorney Brad Dozier. I wanted to take a moment and comment on an experience I recently had with attorney Brad Dozier of Dozier Law Group. I hired Mr. Dozier to represent me in a harassment and retaliation case against a former employer. Without going into the details of the case, I’ll simply say that the case was resolved fairly quickly and I was extremely pleased with the outcome. I have the highest praise for Mr. Dozier and his firm. One thing I realized early on, Mr. Dozier knew precisely what he was doing and what had to be done to get a great result for me. His obvious command of the law and his ability to communicate and explain the intricacies of my case gave me a real sense of confidence and comfort with a process that was totally foreign to me.  At first I had no idea what to expect, but I knew immediately that I had chosen an excellent lawyer to represent me. I was so impressed with how organized and meticulous Mr. Dozier was in terms of focusing and following up on the smallest details and things which I might have overlooked or not considered important. From the day I hired his firm Mr. Dozier was in continuous contact with me, addressing all my questions and concerns and explaining in detail what was to come. Mr. Dozier has a real gift for what he does. He’s relatable, easy to work with, and he took wonderful care of me. I can’t imagine another lawyer being more dedicated and attentive to a client. Absolute highest marks for Brad Dozier and Dozier Law Group.

Dozier Law Group is the very best.  They took the time to hear by issue and gave me so much information.  It was a free consultation and spent too much time on me!  I can't be grateful enough.  If I'm ever in litigation, I will hire them!  Thank you, Mr. Dozier!

After speaking with several law firms I hired Dozier Law Group to represent me in a serious injury case. Brad Dozier handled my case. From the outset Brad was great. He was very proactive, responsive, and he showed a great deal of care and concern for me and what I was going through.  Brad was in continuous contact with me personally from day one, during and after business hours. He and his investigators got right to work and found critical evidence that showed the company’s initial denial of responsibility and its defense was false. Thanks to Brad and his hard work my case was settled for over 20 times the company’s first offer. My experience with Brad and his firm was first rate. I was really well taken care of. If you need a great lawyer to handle your case who is really committed to his work call Brad Dozier at Dozier Law Group.

I had an excellent experience with Brad.  I had someone threatening defamation and trying to blackmail me.  I reached out to Dozier Law Group and Brad contacted me personally within a few hours.  It was immediately obvious that he knew this area of law very well as he counseled me in a very calm and focused manner.  He explained all sides of the legal issues that I was dealing with and communicated the details to me in very clear and understandable way. I had been feeling threatened and was on the defensive about my situation and Brad helped me through the process by coaching me in obtaining and presenting all the supporting evidence that I could find.  He talked me through all the possible arguments that the other person could make and how to respond to each claim calmly, effectively, and with a focus on facts.  He explained all the options that were available to resolve the issue and other factors that might impact the probability of a good outcome.  In the end, I was very confident in his aide and I went from being defensive to proactive and felt confident through the whole process, all because of how clearly he knew what he was doing.  He made himself available by phone at all times of day and sometimes even late at night.  Ultimately, I had the best possible outcome with my harasser and I owe a huge debt of gratitude to Brad and all of his excellent counsel.  I highly recommend Brad, he is a straight-shooter, always available, and without a doubt he is an expert in this type of law.
He is very friendly and very helpful with the problem. Hope he gets good results.

I want to share my experience with Dozier Law Group and attorney Brad Dozier. I hired the firm to represent me in a case involving racial harassment in the workplace and retaliation for reporting the harassment to management.  For over 3 years the firm fought for me through the Covid delays like their lives depended on it, through discovery, summary judgment, and then a jury trial. I have never seen such personal dedication, diligence, commitment and support than I have in dealing with Brad Dozier and his law firm.  Mr. Dozier spent countless hours preparing my case up to and through trial, communicating with me every step of the way, and answering every question I had. Mr. Dozier was relentless in preparing and pressing my case and advocating for me. Many of our conversations and much of our communication took place after business hours and on weekends due to my work schedule.  No one could have worked any harder, prepared more diligently, cared any more, or did as much as Mr. Dozier and his firm did to hold my former employer accountable for its actions.  If you need a lawyer who will fully commit himself to your case and will do everything possible to resolve it successfully, I absolutely recommend Dozier Law Group and attorney Brad Dozier. People like him are rare and unique. I’ve never witnessed such intense personal commitment and dedication. You simply will not find a more professional, hard-working and committed attorney than Brad Dozier at Dozier Law Group.

Don’t do it—use another firm. The reviews under four stars are absolutely accurate. They will constantly call to get your information, then stop responding for months and fail to prioritize your case. You end up doing most of the work yourself while they stop answering calls and act too busy to help. The case managers and receptionists are hurting the firm’s reputation and making the lawyers look bad. Im sure the 5 start reviews are fake . Or maybe there are one or two competent case managers and if that’s the case make sure you specifically request them !😩

I filed a grievance with this law group due to extremely poor communication. After my accident in May 2025, they advised me to stop medical treatment after only two sessions so I “would get more compensation.” I’ve had to repeatedly call for updates with little to no response. they’ve only contacted me  twice on their own after I persistently had to reach out.

I ended up gathering all my medical bills and contacting the  hospital billing dept  myself because it took them months to do something that took me only one day. Finally They received my settlement check in October 2025 and 3 months later guaranteed that accounting would contact me within 7–14 days to disburse my check. It is now the end of January 2026, and I’m still waiting with no response. Calls go straight to voicemail or I’m told I’ll be connected—then I’m not. I’ve been passed between multiple case managers, and the receptionists are no help. I would not recommend this firm to anyone looking to avoid frustration and poor communication. My ongoing experience has been horrible .

I am extremely grateful for the outstanding support I received from Shanera Andrews . From the very beginning she was very professional, attentive, and truly dedicated to my case. She took the time to explain everything clearly, kept me informed throughout the process, and went above and beyond to make sure I felt supported and confident. Her commitment knowledge and genuine care made a stressful situation so much easier to navigate. I highly recommend Shanera Andrews to anyone in need of reliable and exceptional assistance.

I contacted Guardian accident law injury firm back in March 2025 my son who was 12 was an accident. I contacted them in hopes that they would get my son a decent amount. There was a total of seven people in the car, but only five out of the seven filed a claim with the insurance of the people who hit them. They didn’t seek an attorney. They just talked directly to the adjuster of the other person‘s insurance everybody got at least $12-$1300. I went with Guardian law explained to them what happened it doesn’t make sense to have them work a case knowing that I will get my son anywhere from $12-$1300 without their help. The whole point is to get more than that. Guardian law told me that The insurance company offered $800 I would be out of my mind to accept the $800 check for my son then told me that the next was $1,100 and that’s all that they could do. So after speaking with the Other man’s insurance I was able to get more than $1100. I could get a possibly $1300 for my son but I’d have to ask for a drop letter from Guardian. Guardian put a lien because I asked for them to send a drop letter for $430 I believe I wouldn’t dare pay any law firm for them to get paid more than my son would get paid and he was the one in the accident. It doesn’t make sense and I asked for anything that I’ve signed any electronic signatures of anything that I’ve signed for Guardian to represent me. I wanted that and I have yet to receive that in all actuality. They’re asking me now more than the 33% that they were asking if my son won his case they’re asking me now for more than the 33% of what my son is gonna receive that makes no sense either and here it is December 2025 and we only have 23 days left in this year and we still haven’t received any money and everybody else that was in the car with my son receive their checks long time ago and the most I think that they got was $1300 without any representation just speaking to the adjuster so the whole part of me getting Guardian was for them to get my son more than $1300 and that didn’t happen. I don’t recommend them at all because in the end if you don’t get a huge settlement, even if you do get a huge settlement they’re still gonna come away with more then you bring home in your pocket 33% of whatever you get is gonna be more than what you get. They’re gonna get paid more than you and you are the actual victim makes no sense. Not happy at all wouldn’t recommend them

My cousin Cedric used them he been waiting 15 months still haven't received a check he hardly ever can get them on the phone he has to call other people to figure out whats going on I feel bad for him they the worst was told he was getting 50 ended up being 25 which he probably won't receive but 1/3 of that smh

Terrible communication between clients and staff, on hold for several minutes regarding cases without talking to any actual lawyers. Do no assist their clients. Better off going to a law firm that actually prioritizes their clients!

Worst mistake ever signing with this firm, unprofessional my kids accident was Dec 2024, months of me collecting bills, accident report, my child having to have surgery and the other one no longer able to play sports or be active as he once was due to his life changing injuries, she attempted to force me to take a low ball offer & i refused & we had some back & forward via email and I sent her over the law that says something totally different from what she told me. Only then she said she would take it before the lawsuit attorney at their litigation meeting Nov 3,  when I reached out Nov 5 she says she is  waiting to hear back from him. I’ve sent numerous emails since she won’t even respond. Worst decision ever I hate I talked my kids into signing with them, they don’t care and make it very clear that they don’t care about you nor your injuries. If anyone know the supervisor or head attorney email please share it with me I just need to talk with some one else & hopefully more professional

Horrible! They called me, at the time I didn’t know about runners & how it’s possible they illegal got my information days after a car accident. Car accident was in August of 2024 at first they were very responsive well at least the case worker that was helping me get help for my injuries but after they received the settlement money. Which I was only notified from the other parties insurance I haven’t heard a thing I called many times to find out the lawyer on my case “left” the company got a new lawyer & haven’t heard anything from them since the case is still on going a year and a few months later and still nothing. They do not have BBB accreditation & within this same year they had a lawsuit going on which is public records look up these firms before doing business with them & especially don’t do business with this one. Yall have a blessed day and be safe out here.
Terrible just all around terrible
Joke

I BEEN HERE A FEW TIMES BUT THIS TIME OMG I BEEN GETTING TOSS FROM ONE LAWYER TO NEXT AND CLEARLY NO COMMUNICATION AT ALL I HAD TO DO THEY JOB GETTING PAPER WORK, PICTURES, AND THE OTHER PARTIES INSURANCE MADE PAYMENT BUT IT WAS NOT ENOUGH I HAD TO STOP TREATMENT AND ALL BECAUSE IM BEING WRONG INFORMATION CLEARLY WHAT THEY GOING TO DO VS WHAT THEY WANT TO DO ME AND MY FAMILY / FRIENDS WILL NEVER USE THIS COMPANY AGAIN BBB NOT APPROVED SO GOOGLE BEFORE YOU PICK ANY LAW FIRM
