By far the worst experience I have had with a law firm I will never refer a family or friend to this law firm they don’t stay in contact an when u call them they act like u are getting on their nerve when u call for updates an once u start calling them they stop answering. They also told me my case manager wasn’t there today she off then I ask to speak to a supervisor  the case manager just walked in. They play a lot of games an tell a lot of lies if u are reading this RUN. Go to a better law firm than this one if u want to feel like they are working for u than against u  this is not the place to be I really wish I can give them no star for this horrible service I received over the past 9 months it took to them to close out my case
Very knowledgeable, helpful about the case.... Always stayed in touch keeping me up to date with details on case matters.... Thanx 💯

I strongly advise against using Guardian Accident & Injury. At first glance, they appear professional, open, and honest, but my experience has shown otherwise. After digging deeper into my files, I discovered troubling issues that indicate a lack of integrity.

When I requested my files and an itemized document of my bills, what I received was shocking. Instead of my information, Rachel sent me someone else's medical records, which raises serious concerns about their handling of sensitive client data. Additionally, I was billed for 150 units of medication, despite only receiving 4. This discrepancy is just one instance of what I suspect to be falsified billing practices.

It feels as though they are in cahoots with doctors to inflate costs and take advantage of clients. I no longer trust this firm and cannot recommend them to anyone. They seem to prioritize profits over the best interests of their clients. Furthermore, getting in touch with them has been frustrating; I often had to hang up and call back pretending to be a new client just to get any assistance.

In summary, my experience with Guardian Accident & Injury has been disappointing and concerning. I urge others to consider their options carefully before engaging with this firm.

This is the most unprofessional law firm ever! I’m convinced this firm is data brokering meaning they are buying consumer’s information……if you ever wonder how attorneys know about your accident even before a police report is made this is how it’s possible. The receptionist and intake guy is less than smart because if it’s not true or you don’t know the smart thing to do is put me on hold and ask instant attitude gives guilty !  Dear law firm please keep your artificial not intelligent response Thanks!
WEIRD . When I don’t understand something I ask questions. I hate when people try to make you feel stupid for asking questions

This company’s behavior is highly unprofessional and unethical. They screen your phone calls based on the number they have in their system for you and send you to voicemail. They also prevent you from contacting them after receiving payment from the insurance company. It’s disheartening to witness such unscrupulous business practices in this day and age, especially considering the positive reviews they have received, which are likely fabricated!

I strongly advise against this firm under any circumstances. They are only available and willing to discuss your claim before you sign the contract. Once they receive payment from the insurance company, they completely disappear. They provide no updates, never call you, or respond to your emails. They have virtual assistants from a call center that filter your calls before they reach your case managers’ voicemails. If you manage to get someone on the phone (either a case manager or the “accounting department”), they are extremely rude and condescending and can’t provide you with any additional information. They always say they will call you when they have more details. Once the claim is finally settled, they inform you that they have to “process the funds,” which are the same funds they have had for 2-3 months. They claim it will take about 30 business days. It does not take 30 business days to process any type of payment on any type of system. I’ve worked in payment processing for 25 years!  I wish I had read the reviews before signing with them. I did most of the work on the claim, and the only thing they did was accept the check from the insurance company

I was in an accident last October. Guardian law contacted me to represent me. I was then ignored until February when I was told they had reached a settlement and I would receive a check soon, they even gave me an exact amount that I would receive. Then they ghosted me again. Since February I have not seen a check or even been able to get someone to return my calls.

Worst accident firm ever . I had an accident October 2024 , it’s now end Of may going on June of 2025 . Communication was good in the beginning but once it got to the negotiating part (Alex) he’s horrible at communication, doesn’t call back after leaving a voicemail , doesn’t respond to emails , doesn’t calls me on his own . 0/10 don’t recommend. It’s frustrating and I’m not happy with it because they don’t care about no one but themselves .

Hands down best team I've had the pleasure of working on my behalf. Always there when I had questions, would be checking in on me weekly at one point. I definitely appreciate the hard work everyone puts in at this law firm and would highly recommend going with Guardian over any other firms you may be inquiring. Made my mind at ease these last 7 months lord knows it would've been a very difficult time if it wasn't for the wonderful people at Guardian! Thanks for everything!!🙏

If I can give zero stars I would. It’s been six weeks and I still haven’t got my settlement check yet and they constantly lie to me telling we will have your Attorney who is Victoria to call you and nobody has not reach out to me. I will never go to this law firm again ever in life.

Worst company to pick out of all accident lawyers in Atlanta and Metro Atlanta. I wish I could give them 0 stars. No communication with you throughout your case unless you call them. Why should I have to call you about information for my case just to receive updates on how the claim is going ? I have chosen this company twice. The first time my turn around was pretty quick although this time took almost a year, so imagine that without any updates on your case. Go somewhere else !!!!!

I hired Guardian Law to handle a case, and they collected funds from the insurance company in December 2024. They told me it would take about 30 days to allocate and distribute my portion, though they warned the holidays might delay it by a couple of weeks. It’s now March 2025—nearly 90 days later—and I still haven’t received my money. I’ve called multiple times for updates, only to be told they’re waiting on doctor’s offices to sign off on payments. Frustrated, I offered to contact the providers’ accounts receivable departments myself to speed things up, but Guardian Law refused, saying it would interfere with their relationships with these partners and delay the process further.

It’s disappointing to feel like they value their medical contacts more than their own clients. When I call, they answer about half the time, and when they do, I’m promised a follow-up call—which happens maybe 50% of the time. This lack of communication and accountability is incredibly frustrating, especially since they’re taking a significant fee for their services. If I paid any other company this kind of money for a job, they’d have it wrapped up in 72 hours. At this point, I’m still waiting, and Guardian Law seems in no rush to deliver.
They was a great law group and easy to communicate with. They helped me settle my case and was there when I needed legal advice, I recommend them if you need a great law group.

They lawyers here are amazing here at this location ,everyone I came encounter with were very nice .They are stayed on top of everything if there were any changes they made me aware asap, and that was a plus for me (Kecia Wheeler)

The Shin firm was a referral for us as we had never navigated a personal  injury  claim. Our daughter was involved in an auto accident  where her vehicle was rear ended at a traffic light.

There are many reasons  to seek out legal help and the biggest is to protect yourself.  In addition to the shock of the accident some injuries  or extent of the injuries may not be known.

The Shin firm always  had our best interest at heart. Their experience  steered us in the right direction and we never felt any pressure  from them throughout  this process.

Anytime I had questions - all I had to do was call, text, or email Mr. Shin and he got right back to me. Everything was handled online. I never had to go into the office. Mr. Shin kept me informed of the progress on my case on a regular basis. He fought for me, and he made sure that I was taken care of. I would highly recommend The Shin Law Firm to anyone who needs an attorney that the "big name law firms" says that their case is "too little to handle". Mr. Shin realizes that ANYONE who has been in an accident - it is a BIG deal to that person, and he treats them personally, respectfully, and not as a case number.

And, when the VA tried to reduce my disability 100% down to 80%. I reached back out to Mr. Brenner,  and again he simply said "I'll handle it"... and again he did just what he said.... securing my 100%. I can honestly say with lawyer like Mr. Brenner on Affleck & Gordon legal team... there is not a better lawyer or law firm..... reviews.text:
I am writing this review to warn potential clients, especially those in vulnerable situations, about my experience with attorney Harry Brenner.

My mother hired Mr. Brenner to represent me in a Social Security Disability case. From the beginning, I was systematically excluded from my own legal process. Despite my being the actual client, Mr. Brenner failed to communicate with me directly.

This is not just my perception; it is documented. I have an email where Mr. Brenner tells my mother, "I'd rather just explain it to you anyways," while simultaneously ignoring my own direct inquiries. This email chain also reveals a history of 14 prior emails between them, proving a sustained pattern of secret communication that deliberately cut me, the client, out of the loop.

This fundamental breach of attorney-client confidentiality and loyalty had devastating consequences:

· Critical evidence, including a strong psychological report, was omitted from my application, guaranteeing its failure.
· The result was an "Unfavorable" ruling that now permanently damages my record and makes future approvals difficult.
· His actions effectively sabotaged my case, and I am now left dealing with the fallout, including a massive overpayment debt.

An attorney's primary duty is to their client. Mr. Brenner violated this duty by representing my mother's interests over mine. He demonstrated a clear conflict of interest, a failure to communicate, and a level of professional negligence that has caused me significant and lasting harm.

I would not recommend this attorney to anyone. He fundamentally failed in his most basic ethical and professional obligations.
Outstanding law firm ! Affleck and Gordon were wonderful to work with, were always available to answer questions, etc. They guided me through the whole process until we won the case.  Thank you !
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words! We’re glad to hear our team could guide you through the process and keep you informed along the way. It was a pleasure working with you, and we’re thrilled we could help achieve a successful outcome.

reviews.text:

Working with Iliana was one of the most frustrating experiences I’ve ever had with a professional. Communication was almost nonexistent, and I constantly felt ignored and left to figure things out on my own.

When problems came up, she offered little to no help, and I ended up having to hire another attorney to fix issues that should have been handled properly the first time. It cost me extra time, money, and unnecessary stress.

I understand that she is not the person who decides immigration cases, but I at least expected her to actively work on mine. When I brought this up, her response was, “I am not immigration; I suggest you find another attorney.”

Guess what — my next attorney immediately pointed out important details and options that I had never heard from Iliana. That alone showed me how little attention my case actually received.

In my opinion, Iliana does not take responsibility for her clients or their cases once she’s been paid. I would strongly recommend doing your research and finding an attorney who will actually guide and support you through the process.

reviews.text: First, I want to say that yes I did receive a settlement that was more than fair. The reason I did is because I have a team of true professionals at Castan & Lecca who are very detail oriented and have been very thorough in every single aspect of my case. I was involved in a collision where I was sitting still at a red light and was rearended by a truck who never hit their brakes causing me to run into the vehicle in front of me. A friend referred me to Alex Lecca. Alex called me as soon as he got out of court and got the ball rolling. His assistant Lorena called me almost immediately and there was no mention of legalities but rather she sounded sincerely concerned about my health and with my permission, she set up a chiroprator's appt for me. It was early on and the real pain had yet to kick in so she wanted me to go ahead and get an examination by the chiroprator and then from there she took care of all of my medical needs. I apologize, I can't think of Mike's last name but he and Lorena have both been so good about keeping me informed throughout the entire process and they are both very friendly. The process isn't over. A good lawyer seeks out every option available to care for their client and there is a second phase to my case that may lead to additional compensation. I'm convinced that with many attorney's this second phase may be skipped. With Castan & Lecca you can be assured that you are treated with a feeling as if you are their only client. I'm so impressed with their knowledge, professionalism, and did I mention how friendly they are. I highly recommend this law firm.

I came to Attorney Dorfman after being dragged into a completely baseless and emotionally overwhelming contempt action. From the moment she took my case, Tracy brought decades of expertise, confidence, and strategic precision that immediately shifted the entire trajectory of the situation.

On the morning of the hearing, I watched her calmly and powerfully dismantle the false claims being made against me. She confronted the opposing party with facts, law, and technical accuracy they couldn’t refute. She protected me, redirected hostility, and immediately established authority.

Inside the courtroom, Tracy was unstoppable. She clearly explained the true history of the case, exposed the inconsistencies and retaliatory motives behind the opposing party’s actions, and advocated for me with a level of clarity and professionalism that left absolutely no doubt about the truth. The judge denied the contempt motion entirely and even awarded me attorney’s fees, which is RARE.

But what meant the most to me was Tracy’s compassion. At one point during the hearing, when I became visibly shaken from the stress of the last several months, Tracy reached over and gently squeezed my hand. That simple act reminded me that I wasn’t alone. I had someone capable, steady, and genuinely caring in my corner. She gave me my peace of mind back.

If you want a lawyer who will not only fight for you, but stand with you, Tracy A. Dorfman is who you need.

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience with this law firm during my immigration process. They were professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly supportive every step of the way. Carlos and is team guidance gave me peace of mind, and I’m so grateful for the successful outcome. Highly recommend to anyone needing immigration help!

Thank you, Emily Davis and Ross & Pines.

After consulting numerous so-called "expert" immigration lawyers each of whom gave me nothing but negative responses—I was left feeling defeated and bracing for the worst: deportation. With hope nearly gone, I made one final attempt. I reached out to Emily.

From our very first meeting, she brought an unexpected calm to the chaos. She listened with genuine attention and, combining professionalism with clarity, laid out a clear and actionable path forward. Unlike others, she didn't see the situation as a closed case; Instead, she saw opportunity. She made it clear that there was still much to accomplish, much to prove, and a strong likelihood of success.

Emily immediately acted. It became clear early on that she worked not only with experience and legal expertise but also with genuine dedication and empathy. She was the only one who said, “We’ll get this resolved.” And she was right.

Today, I received an email from USCIS confirming that my case has been decided—in my favor. This journey was long and filled with anxiety, fear, and a heavy sense of injustice. I lived under the constant shadow of a deportation I never deserved. After God, it is through Emily's academic preparation, teaching expertise, and cultural values ​​that I can say today: I have succeeded.

Emily needs no introduction or recommendation. Her litigation work and professional track record speak for themselves. But I feel compelled to recognize her not only for her skill, but for her extraordinary humanity. Thank you, Emily. My parents, my wife, and my siblings likewise hold you in high regard, respect, and gratitude for all you have accomplished in the pursuit of family unity. May God bless you.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

After consulting different criteria from "expert" immigration lawyers, all negative without exception and almost resigned to an imminent deportation, I played my last card, my last attempt: Emily.

From the initial interview, she immediately conveyed a sense of calm. She listened attentively to my situation and very professionally presented me with a plan and a solution, confident that there was much to be done, much to prove, and that I had a strong chance of a successful outcome in my legal case.

Emily began working immediately, and I could see that she did so with deep dedication, great sensitivity, and above all, by drawing on her extensive experience. She was the only one who told me, "We'll get through this." And we did.

Today I received an email confirming that the ruling is indeed in my favor. Those were long days of anguish, moments of uncertainty, conflicting emotions, and a great fear of deportation, which I never deserved. Thanks to God, her academic preparation, her teaching, and the cultural values ​​that Emily offers, today I can say: I did it.

Emily needs no introduction or recommendation; her litigation and professional record speak for themselves. But it is imperative for me to acknowledge her humanity and honor her abilities. Thank you, Emily. My parents, my wife, and my siblings also admire, respect, and thank you for everything you have accomplished for the sake of family unity. God bless you.

Well first of all I’ll like to thank everyone in the office specially Emily!! A little back ground story I had a different attorney local to me in Chattanooga that I started my immigration case of adjustment of status through marriage. This local attorney was horrible and I felt very insecure about the outcome of my case. I couldn’t speak to the attorney directly I had to always go through the paralegal assistant who’s been in training for almost a year!!! My brother used Emily before and he asked me how my case was going I told him I was very worried and he asked me why not use Emily and I told him well she’s in Atlanta. He said so what she’s amazing! I told him you know what at this point the Chattanooga attorney told me it could take years for my case and interview so sure l’ll give Emily a try. So I did give her a try and to be honest I regret not taking her in sooner!! She was so easy to contact and so much more way more knowledgeable!!! She made me and my husband feel safe and secured!! Not long after I got her to take on the case I got my interview!! She was with us every step along the way and now I’m a permanent resident!!! I recommend her and her team and trust me she’s worth every mile to get her on your side!! Don’t get a local attorney just to make it an easy commute just get her and feel confident and secured 1000%!!! I’ll come back to her for my USA citizenship application in the future!! Thank you Emily thank you so much!!! ❤️

This firm cares about you!  They were able to help me when other attorneys couldn’t. They read my paperwork when no one else even asked to see it. The attention from each employee & attorney was the most reliable & caring part of this journey. I couldn’t thank this team enough. They will always be my referral to anyone/everyone in need for any immigration need.

A Life-Changing Legal Team — Grateful Beyond Words

I want to sincerely thank Emily Davis, Carlos Solomiany, and their entire team for their outstanding work on my immigration case. From the very beginning, they were professional, compassionate, and truly invested in helping me through one of the most difficult chapters of my life.

Thanks to their knowledge, experience, and dedication, they helped me remove a 34 year old deportation order and ultimately secure my green card — something I once thought was impossible.

In 1991, when I was just 12 years old, I had a court hearing where no one represented me. That day, a judge placed me into removal proceedings. Years later, even though I married a U.S. citizen, that order prevented me from getting my green card in 2012. I hired two other lawyers before finding Emily and Carlos — I lost time, money, hope, and trust. But I never gave up. While searching on Google, God placed them in my path, and their firm stood out from all the rest.

They walked me through every step of the process, kept me informed, and treated me with respect and genuine care. I never felt like just another case. They gave me hope when I had almost none — and they fought with heart to get me the result I’d waited so long for.

If you're looking for immigration attorneys who are not only highly skilled but also deeply compassionate and trustworthy, I wholeheartedly recommend Emily Davis and Carlos Solomiany. I will always be grateful to them and their team for helping me close this chapter and start a new one — with my green card.
They are very kind, polite people and they help you a lot. I highly recommend them; in my experience, they are the best!

Noah and his team are the best in the business. I was treated with dignity and respect throughout the process; and while direct, their communication is first class and honest. I trust this team fully and so should you.

I had to turn to Noah for help with a serious allegation made against me. From the beginning, he was attentive and engaging. With the information I provided, he was able to identify and pursue the right contacts to navigate the system efficiently. Thanks to his skill and experience, my case was dismissed much sooner than I expected. I’m incredibly grateful for his professionalism and would absolutely recommend him to anyone needing top-level legal representation.

Hey there!

Let me tell you about Attorney Tracy – she's absolutely amazing! I was in a really tough spot a  month ago; my ex-boyfriend filed a warrant against me, claiming all sorts of things that were completely untrue. Five counts! I was terrified, I'd never had any legal trouble before. Facing a warrant hearing was seriously the scariest thing ever. I only had 30 days to respond, which is crazy stressful.

From the moment I called Attorney Tracy, she was a lifesaver. She’s so incredibly easy to talk to – down-to-earth and really kind. She was super efficient, got all the info she needed and even went the extra mile to track down some stuff I couldn't get myself. She kept me calm and positive throughout the whole process, which I really needed.

And get this – on the court date, she spoke with my ex and convinced him to dismissed the case before we approached the Judge! My ex is notoriously difficult, so this was beyond what I ever expected. Seriously, I think she has superpowers! I can't recommend her highly enough. If you ever need a lawyer, don't hesitate to give her a call. You won't regret it!

Best,

Khadija Miller

I am incredibly grateful for the outstanding legal representation I received from Noah H. Pines. He expertly guided me through a challenging case involving MIP and false impersonation charges. Noah's skill in negotiating with the prosecutor was remarkable, resulting in a well-balanced plea that I am very satisfied with. I highly recommend Noah to anyone in need of a dedicated and effective lawyer.

I would like to thank Ross Pines of Ross & Pines
and Mark Begnaud of Eshman/Begnaud for their professionalism, knowledge
and compassion in helping me through the maze of civil rights litigation for police misconduct.
I was wrongly arrested while recording a traffic stop in September of 2023 and held in jail for 6 days for no apparent reason. After finally getting out I asked the business where the incident happened if they could retrieve the camera footage from that day. Found out their system had a 5 day loop, I was held for 6 days and the police purposely stepped on my phone at time of my arrest. They didn't know I had my phone repaired and retrieved the video from the incident.
Also, the arresting officer claimed his body cam batteries were dead. For a year and a half I contacted
many law firms to get help in pursuing a suit against this police department and the officer. They all responded back they couldn't take my case because I didn't have any major injuries. In April of this year, after continuing to reach out to law firms I got a call from Ross Pines inquiring about my case. I sent him the video and a copy of the police report, which was a complete fabrication of the incident, and he called back to say he saw some merit in this and turned it over to Mark Begnaurd. Mark took the ball and ran with it and negotiated a 6 figure settlement about 1 month.
I am so grateful to these 2 law firms for understanding that there's more to being lawyers than just ambulance chasing.
They understand that protecting the civil rights of Americans is one the most important issues because if we don't stand up for our rights we are destined to loose them.

Noah was honest, incredibly knowledgeable, and completely dedicated to my case. He took the time to explain every step of the legal process, always made himself available for questions, and consistently fought for the best possible outcome.

If you're looking for an attorney who will truly go the extra mile, who knows the law inside and out, and who genuinely cares about his clients, I can't recommend Noah Pines highly enough.

Although I had hoped to never require the services of a personal injury attorney, I am grateful to have found Peter Ross at Ross & Pines when I did. From the very beginning, Peter and his staff were professional and courteous advocates. I appreciate his clear and upfront communication style. I always felt like he was in my corner, available for questions or advice and had my best interest in mind. I hope to never require these services again, but if I or anyone I know does in the future, Peter will be my first call.

I explained to her the statute of limitations, as we are getting close, and she promptly told me they get 20 calls a day.  I'm not sure how the original 10-14 day promise will be met. This review is for Catharine ‘Cat’ Peterson, Senior Paralegal with Malone Law Medical Malpractice and Severe Injury Lawyers, 2 Ravina Drive, NE, Suite 300, Atlanta, GA 30346. It was in my inbox before I hung up my cell phone. She also recommended that I file an online complaint with the Georgia Composite Medical Board immediately.

If you are looking for a professional, reliable, considerate, and experienced Senior Paralegal, look no further than Catharine ‘Cat’ Peterson with Malone Law Medical  Malpractice and Severe Injury Lawyers in Atlanta, GA. As a clinical pharmacist, I highly recommend Catharine. She provided me with more helpful information than the GA Bar Association in Atlanta. Catharine genuinely cares about her clients and is always ready to answer questions when you need assistance. If she can’t help you, she will recommend other alternatives. This firm never offered to help or take my case - just a bunch of run around about an extremely sensitive topic. Ronald Kaplan is extremely rude, insensitive, and will cover up being “direct” with a potential client to save face for him actually being ignorant. It is not the fact that they did not take my case that makes me feel any type of way, it is how the Mr. Kaplan went about it, how he talked me, and how he made me feel.
I don’t need anyone to coddle my feelings - but at the very least he could’ve shown some human decency and RESPECT, but he did not.
I would not recommend him to anyone. Not even for a consultation.

Having Dr. Kaplan representing my case was the best decision I could have made about my case. He really cared about me as his client and faught for my case in the most professional way. I will always be greatful to him and his amazing assistant, Ms. Susy.

I recently had the pleasure of working with the attorney law office of Ronald I Kaplan LLP and I could not be more pleased with their services. From the initial consultation through the successful resolution of my case, I found their professionalism, knowledge, and availability to be top-notch.

They kept me informed every step of the way, carefully explaining how the process worked and what I could expect. They were incredibly responsive to my questions, no matter how big or small, and their dedication to providing quality legal services was obvious. They worked hard to ensure I understood every aspect of my case.

The outcome of my case was excellent and I am grateful for the way Ronald Kaplan handled my case. I highly recommend their services and would not hesitate to hire them again if the need arises. Five stars!
Avoid at all costs. Incredibly rude and lacks professionalism.
They have compassion! Thank you Jay Kaplan for your advice and help in my time of need.

Absolutely awful experience, he emailed me to follow up with me and seemed angry that I haven’t answered him. I told him about my case and he kept suggesting my condition wasn’t linked to my injury, sir, yes it is. We went back and forth, I told him when my pain started, I had plenty of evidence of doctors visits after the injury, I had ER visits, ct scans of my chest, every possible test, and then he says there’s no injury unless I need surgery; I’m like Uh no that’s not how it works. I have a lifelong inflammation issue at 22 caused my negligence of a massage therapist. He told me I should see a chest surgeon, for what?! I know as diagnosed with inflammation of my chest and ribs, I had CT scans that reveled nothing wrong with my lungs or broken bones. I’m so glad he didn’t want my case because these reviews are awful!!!

I had a wonderful experience with this law firm.  Mr. Lukoski and his paralegal Susy Ross were always in touch with me with each stage of my lawsuit. They both went above and beyond keeping me informed with what was going on and what to expect. I am grateful for their help in settling my case.

I was referred to Mr. Kaplan as well about a potential wrongful death case. I could barely get a word out before he would continuously stifle and Interrupt me. I would AVOID at all costs. He is a very rude person that lacks manners and professionalism. There’s kinder attorneys out there.

Also if you run a quick search on this former doctor, his own patients rated him poorly with a 1 out 5 rating.

I reached out to Dr. Ron Kaplan today to discuss my medical malpractice case. He was recommended to me thru an attorney friend so I was anxious to hear his thoughts on my case. Dr. Kaplan was warm at first and asked me several questions about my case. However, once he realized he would not be able to take my case, his tone changed. I was disappointed because knowing he was also a medical doctor, I thought he would have more of a vested interest. But this was not the case. He more or less defended the negligent practice that let me down for years. I did a little research and found that Dr. Kaplan himself had very low ratings on his own patient reviews during the days when he was an Internist, one even having to do with an incorrect diagnosis, so I wondered if this is where the attitude switch came from.  I’m not sure if he is still a practicing doctor today, (not sure how one is both a Dr. and a lawyer at the same time)? but he answered the phone to me as a lawyer, a very insensitive one.
Good firm
Derek was amazing throughout the entire process. I wish I could rate more than 10 stars. I would definitely recommend his law firm. Thank you for everything!

I had a great experience working with Derek. He was able to resolve my case with a settlement outside of court, which made the entire process far less stressful than I expected. He was communicative, professional, and clearly knew what he was doing. As far as lawsuits go, this was about as smooth as it gets. I’d highly recommend him to anyone needing legal representation.

reviews.text:
From the very first phone call, I knew I was in capable hands. The team at Rohan Law immediately recognized that the case against me lacked merit, and attorney Doug Rohan confidently assessed it as a slam dunk case. What followed was a seamless, stress-free process that wrapped up in under two months.

I was thoroughly briefed on all potential outcomes, with a strong likelihood that the case would be resolved out of court—and that’s exactly what happened. The professionalism and courtesy shown by everyone at the firm—from the front desk to the support staff and paralegals—were exceptional. Emmanuel ensured all documentation was gathered and every procedural step was handled promptly and accurately.

Once I signed the contract and submitted my documents, I didn’t have to lift a finger. Paralegal Carmen Chavez kept me informed every step of the way with timely updates via calls and texts, making sure I was never left in the dark.

The firm delivered on its promise: my attorney settled the case directly with the court’s solicitor, and I never had to appear in court. When attorney Doug called to tell me, the case was officially closed—on my birthday, no less—it felt like the best gift I could’ve received.

If you’re looking for a law firm that’s sharp, efficient, genuinely cares about your outcome, and delivers results, I wholeheartedly recommend Rohan Law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sachin, Thank you for sharing your thoughtful review! 🌟 We’re so glad to hear that your experience with Rohan Law was seamless and stress-free. reviews.text: You never want to be in a position where your family needs legal counsel. But then life has a way of throwing you curveballs. We have learned that just saying “we’ll just tell them the truth, how bad can this be?” is not a good legal defense. As Doug pointed out “anything can and will be used against you” is literally the playbook. We thank God for the work Doug did on our family’s behalf. My case had been pending for over three years following an arrest in January 2023 for misdemeanor Battery-Family Violence. Attorneys Brandon and Michael were able to negotiate a plea deal under the First Offender Act.

Thanks to their work, I received 12 months of probation, family violence intervention classes, and continued mental health treatment, with no community service, jail time, or fines. Once I complete my probation, the charges will be dismissed and removed from my record.

Brandon and Michael are extremely knowledgeable, and my case manager, Lamar, was very helpful and responsive to all of my questions. Although the court process lasted over three years, Michael and Brandon helped me navigate it successfully. I highly recommend their services.

First, I’ll start off by saying I was referred to this law firm for my wife’s traffic violation by a reputable source. Secondly, the experience and communication was not the best. We did 89% if not more of the communication for any updates and offers on my wife’s case. We were constantly told, “ If we have any updates, we will let you know.” “Let me reach out to your attorney and I’ll get back to you before noon.” I can honestly say we were both underwhelmed with this process and journey of her case. We had no idea who her attorney was until literally the day before her court date. That’s not an exaggeration. We followed up the day before court to confirm her appearance was needed and asked of any offers. We’d been asking for offers for quite some time so we could know how to move forward and be prepared. We received the offer the day before court and we asked our appropriate questions after reviewing. The day of court, the attorney arrived after 10am after the court started. Which we were reassured that it was okay and the judge knew not to call the case until the attorney was present. Observing all other attorneys with their clients, they all had ONE thing in common, RAPPORT. My wife did not have that with her attorney and it showed. Also, after we got her terms and conditions, it was clear the attorney did not know fully what her terms were to fulfill her probation. We confirmed with all officials to have a clear and complete understanding of what to expect for her. I’d also like to add that we never met with the attorney and from the reviews it appears most clients met with their attorney. We were also told by our attorney he’d see what he could do to sweeten the deal and while we appreciate whatever that meant, nothing felt as if he fought for her truly for her case. I had high hopes and must say at least we had an attorney to get through this challenging time for my wife. Please use your own discretion when seeking an attorney. I like most use reviews and word of mouth and in this case we were not completely satisfied. However, we thank attorney Rosenbloom, Lamar, and whomever else we came into contact with at their firm for their time.

When I say I'm over joyed and pleased with my results. My very first case and Mr. Michael and his staff made it easy. He fought for me and my family. Case Dismissed ! Money well worth every penny.

reviews.text:
Over the past year and a half, attorney Ashley and her incredible legal support Carol have been nothing short of exceptional. They represented me in a complex and deeply personal case related to Steven Johnson Syndrome (SJS) and Toxic Epidermal Necrolysis (TEN), a life-altering medical crisis caused by negligence. Thanks to their expertise, dedication, and strategic approach, we achieved a successful resolution without ever having to step foot in a courtroom.

What set Ashley and Carol apart was their relentless communication and care. I never had to chase updates. They consistently reached out to me first, checking in with genuine concern and providing timely, thorough updates every step of the way. Ashley always made herself available for in-person or FaceTime meetings, and both she and Carol responded to my messages with speed, empathy, and clarity.

Ashley never rushed me to make decisions. She was transparent about implications and fully respected my pace, offering not just legal guidance but human understanding. She courageously took on the healthcare provider who nearly ended my life, as well as UnitedHealthcare/Optum, challenging both medical negligence and corporate indifference with conviction and compassion.

Through it all, Ashley was a bright light. Her presence is comforting, her advocacy is fierce, and when you meet her, you’ll know exactly what I mean... she fights for you like a friend who refuses to let you stand alone. If you’re lucky enough to have Ashley and Carol in your corner, know that you’re in the best hands possible.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ashley and Carol are very dedicated and passionate in the efforts. Great clients like you make it a joy to do what we do. We appreciate the kind words and remarks more than you will ever know.

reviews.text: During what was undoubtedly one of the most difficult times in our lives, Ashley Spires and Carol Smithson proved to be invaluable. They were nothing short of outstanding! We were navigated through each step of the legal proceedings with sensitivity and compassion. Ashley was incredibly knowledgeable and thorough in her approach, making sure we understood all our options regarding our case. Her dedication and professionalism helped alleviate our stress during the emotional legal process. We are deeply grateful for Ashley’s help and highly recommend her and her team to anyone facing similar circumstances.

I met this company through a lawsuit I had in reference to my husband death. They were patient with me and they were always willing to answer my questions and keep me updated. When the time finally came and I received my settlement, I felt like when Kelley called me I was sharing the news with a friend.
Thank you guys for your patience and all you did.

I can't say enough good things about Ashley Spires she is an intelligent, thoughtful but tough attorney. She provided invaluable assistance to our family and we received a very favorable  outcome on our case. Her team including Carol Smithson, were always receptive and timely with any questions we had about our case. There is no doubt in my mind that she will fight her hardest for her clients.
It's been long time with my hernia mesh claim but they always try to give me updates and as a person about to have surgery number 3 I appreciate that.
I have nothing but good things to say. I was always kept informed. Kelsey always accepted my calls & listened to me whine. For that I'm extremely grateful.

By the time they took their 40 % and "fees" it was almost half the judgement and im stuck with pain for the rest of my life.this co called me to get signed up on class action suit i didnt know of them prior to this and i always had to call them every month because they would never update me.but this is my opinion
reviews.ownerResponse:
We feel this review is a bit unfair and not in full disclosure. We worked on your case for over 9 years in a very hard-fought battle with your defendants. Most firms would have never taken your case to begin with given the complex nature of the same. We only charged our agreed-upon attorney fees of 40% at the onset for this complex product liability claim, and did not make a penny more in attorney fees. Beyond that, as you know, there was an independent third-party federal court that got involved in your case and controlled all aspects of the distribution process by federal court order after your case concluded. Although that court had nothing to do with us or our efforts, we know you are understandably upset with their involvement. We did not like it either, but we also know that any other expenses they may have charged or required of you had nothing to do with CSS or the named defendants in this matter.

We value our clients and always strive to do the best we can for them. Despite independent matters that came into play here beyond our control on your specific case, we tried to do that for you too. We are not going to say anything more about this matter to protect confidentiality, but we wanted to remind you of the same and all the effort/work we did for you, especially when most would never have done so. We welcome the opportunity to discuss this with you in more detail offline but do not want to say more here for privacy and other related reasons. We wish you all the best in the interim.
